title: Scar Tissue
why_this_song: Scar Tissue by Red Hot Chili Peppers (1999) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "i'll" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "i'll" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "birds" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "birds" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Scar tissue that I wish you saw
With the birds I'll share this lonely viewin'
Autumn's sweet we call it fall

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Red Hot Chili Peppers one question about "Scar Tissue", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Red Hot Chili Peppers sobre "Scar Tissue", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Scar Tissue" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Scar Tissue" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Scar Tissue" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Scar Tissue" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Scar Tissue" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Scar Tissue" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Scar Tissue" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Scar Tissue" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Scar Tissue" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Scar Tissue", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?
